# Catppuccin for Typora

> Typora editor themes for all four Catppuccin flavors (Mocha, Macchiato, Frappé, Latte). CSS is generated from a single Node script; tokens use `rgba()` instead of `color-mix()` for older WebKit (e.g. macOS Typora 1.13.x). PDF/print uses `@media print` with `.typora-export` so backgrounds stay `--ctp-base` and typography stays on palette variables, with TOC backgrounds flattened.

Important notes:

- After editing `scripts/generate-themes.mjs`, run `node scripts/generate-themes.mjs` at the repo root to refresh the four `catppuccin-*.css` files. Typora does not require Node to use the themes.
- Theme filenames use lowercase ASCII (Typora requirement): `catppuccin-frappe.css`, etc.

## Documentation

- [README（简体中文，默认）](README.md): 安装、口味表、生成脚本、PDF/打印、参考与许可
- [README.en.md（English）](README.en.md): Same content in English

## Themes (generated CSS)

- [catppuccin-mocha.css](catppuccin-mocha.css): Mocha (dark) — `:root` palette, Typora chrome variables, `#write`, CodeMirror `cm-s-inner` / source `cm-s-typora-default`, print block
- [catppuccin-macchiato.css](catppuccin-macchiato.css): Macchiato flavor
- [catppuccin-frappe.css](catppuccin-frappe.css): Frappé flavor
- [catppuccin-latte.css](catppuccin-latte.css): Latte (light) flavor

## Tooling

- [generate-themes.mjs](scripts/generate-themes.mjs): Palettes, `derivedAlphaVars()` for `rgba` custom properties, `printExportStyles()`, `commonStyles()` string; writes four theme files

## Configuration

- [.gitignore](.gitignore): Ignore patterns for macOS, editors, and optional Node artifacts

## Optional

- [Write Custom Theme (Typora)](https://theme.typora.io/doc/Write-Custom-Theme/): Official Typora theme/CSS variable reference
- [Catppuccin](https://github.com/catppuccin/catppuccin): Upstream palette and branding
- [Catppuccin Palette](https://github.com/catppuccin/palette): Machine-readable colors and CSS variable naming
- [Community Typora port (reference)](https://github.com/stephanlamoureux/typora-catppuccin): Separate implementation; useful for README/screenshot patterns only
